title: National Media Platforms and Mobile Transformation — Mediacorp, Singapore
summary: National-scale media, election, news, streaming, CMS, mobile, Apple Watch, and corporate experience architecture across Mediacorp.
claims: Joz worked across national-scale media, news, streaming, mobile, and CMS platforms at Mediacorp.
The programme included Channel NewsAsia, elections-related work, Apple Watch UX, and corporate UX guidelines.
proof_points: The broader Mediacorp proof already covers 30× monthly active audience growth and mobile-first transformation.
This grouped programme record exists to answer employer-specific questions with more concrete project detail.
projects: Apple Watch app UX for Channel NewsAsia
Channel NewsAsia iOS and Android apps
source_notes: Grouped programme record. The 30× MAU proof belongs to the broader Mediacorp transformation context, not each individual sub-project.
